title: Honeycomb Trigger
description: Represents a trigger alerting rule in Honeycomb that fires when query results meet specified threshold conditions, notifying configured recipients via PagerDuty, Email, Webhook, Microsoft Teams, or Slack.

name.description: The display name of the trigger.

description.description: A human-readable description of what the trigger monitors.

disabled.description: Whether the trigger is currently disabled.

query.description: The query specification that defines the data to evaluate.

frequency.description: How frequently in seconds the trigger is evaluated.

recipients.description: List of recipients to notify when the trigger fires.

created_at.description: ISO8601 formatted time the trigger was created.

updated_at.description: ISO8601 formatted time the trigger was last updated.

Threshold.description: The threshold configuration that determines when the trigger fires.

op.description: The comparison operator for the threshold.

value.description: The threshold value to compare against.

exceeded_limit.description: Number of consecutive times the threshold must be exceeded before the trigger fires.

RecipientRef.description: A reference to a notification recipient.

id.description: The ID of the recipient to notify.

Recipient.description: A notification recipient that can be targeted by triggers and burn alerts.

target.description: The target address or identifier for the recipient, such as an email address or webhook URL.

created_at.description: ISO8601 formatted time the recipient was created.

updated_at.description: ISO8601 formatted time the recipient was last updated.
